description: Integrated Disease Surveillance Programme - syndromic alerts that the ASHA must escalate to the ANM/MO for IDSP reporting.

text.en: Report to ANM/MO today; AFP is reportable within 24 hours under polio surveillance.
Refer to paediatric facility for stool samples and neurological assessment.

rules.rationale: AFP in under-15s requires immediate notification to maintain India's polio-free status.

text.en: Refer urgently to a paediatric/medical college for LP and supportive care.
Notify IDSP unit; AES/JE is mandatorily reportable.

rules.rationale: AES carries high case fatality; early supportive care and JE surveillance are part of the IDSP weekly form.

text.en: Isolate the case; give Vitamin A per IMNCI.
Line-list household and school contacts; report to MO for outbreak response.

rules.rationale: Measles/rubella is targeted for elimination; any suspected case triggers an outbreak investigation.
